_doc: Additional farms beyond the 12 hand-coded loaders. Drop a CSV with these columns: name,sire,dam,damsire,fee_usd,fee_terms,fee_qualifier (and optionally year_of_birth,color,height_hands,entered_stud_year,nominations). Set enabled=false to suppress a farm without removing its config.

farms.name: Mill Ridge Farm
farms._notes: Lexington, KY. 2026 roster: Oscar Performance ($60K), Casa Creed ($8.5K), Aloha West ($6.5K).

farms.name: Pin Oak Stud
farms._notes: Versailles, KY. 2026 stallions Alternation, Broken Vow (private fees).

farms.name: Crestwood Farm
farms._notes: Lexington, KY. 2026 includes Sir Winston ($5K), Il Miracolo (NEW $7.5K, son of Gun Runner), Heart To Heart.

farms.name: Darby Dan Farm
farms._notes: Lexington, KY. Full 2026 roster of 11 stallions led by Blazing Sevens (NEW), Flameaway, Dialed In all at $10K.

farms.name: Sequel Stallions New York
farms._notes: NY-bred sires. Empire State Stallion Stakes / NYSS-eligible market.

farms.name: Harris Farms
farms._notes: Coalinga, CA. Cal-bred market. Notable: Smiling Tiger lineage.

farms.name: Bridlewood Farm
farms._notes: Ocala, FL. Notable: First Samurai, J Boys Echo.

farms.name: Northview Stallion Station
farms._notes: Chesapeake City, MD / Peach Bottom, PA. Mid-Atlantic regional.
